items.title: Google Earth’s flight simulator is now available in your browser
items.summary: On Friday Google announced it was making a relatively unknown feature of Google Earth available to a wider audience. The desktop version of Google Earth has had a hidden flight simulator mode since 20…

items.title: As AI agents become employees, NewCore emerges with $66M to give them identities
items.summary: NewCore argues the next challenge in enterprise security will be managing AI agents, not people.
